```{r literature-narratives, results='asis'}
if (is.null(literature)) {
  cat("\n::: {.callout-note}\nLiterature narrative data not available for this sample.\n:::\n")
} else {
  # literature can be a list of narrative entries or a tibble
  lit_entries <- if (is.data.frame(literature)) {
    # Convert tibble rows to list
    split(literature, seq_len(nrow(literature)))
  } else if (is.list(literature)) {
    literature
  } else {
    list()
  }

  if (length(lit_entries) == 0) {
    cat("\n::: {.callout-note}\nNo literature narratives generated for this sample.\n:::\n")
  } else {
    for (entry in lit_entries) {
      gene <- entry$gene %||% entry$Gene %||% "Unknown Gene"
      alteration <- entry$alteration %||% entry$Alteration %||% ""
      narrative <- entry$narrative %||% entry$text %||% entry$summary %||% ""
      references <- entry$references %||% entry$refs %||% entry$pmids %||% list()

      # Section header for each variant
      cat(glue("\n### {gene} {alteration}\n\n"))

      # Narrative paragraph
      if (nchar(narrative) > 0) {
        cat(narrative)
        cat("\n\n")
      }

      # References with PubMed links
      if (length(references) > 0) {
        cat("**References:**\n\n")
        for (i in seq_along(references)) {
          ref <- references[[i]]
          if (is.list(ref)) {
            pmid <- ref$pmid %||% ref$PMID %||% ""
            title <- ref$title %||% ref$Title %||% ""
            authors <- ref$authors %||% ref$Authors %||% ""
            journal <- ref$journal %||% ref$Journal %||% ""
            year <- ref$year %||% ref$Year %||% ""

            # Format: Author et al. (Year). Title. Journal. [PubMed]
            author_display <- if (nchar(authors) > 0) {
              paste0(str_extract(authors, "^[^,]+"), " et al.")
            } else {
              ""
            }

            citation <- paste0(
              i, ". ",
              if (nchar(author_display) > 0) paste0(author_display, " ") else "",
              if (nchar(year) > 0) paste0("(", year, "). ") else "",
              if (nchar(title) > 0) paste0("*", title, "* ") else "",
              if (nchar(journal) > 0) paste0(journal, ". ") else "",
              if (nchar(pmid) > 0) {
                paste0("[PubMed:", pmid, "](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/", pmid, ")")
              } else { "" }
            )
            cat(citation, "\n")
          } else if (is.character(ref)) {
            # Simple PMID string
            pmid <- gsub("[^0-9]", "", ref)
            if (nchar(pmid) > 0) {
              cat(glue("{i}. [PubMed:{pmid}](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/{pmid})"), "\n")
            } else {
              cat(glue("{i}. {ref}"), "\n")
            }
          }
        }
        cat("\n")
      }

      cat("\n---\n\n")
    }
  }
}
```
